data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Scheduled start time with check-in window', but the evidence does not explicitly confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a scheduled exam time and a check-in window, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to substantiate that the system enforces this requirement. Therefore, the evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No concrete evidence or API checks provided to confirm the implementation of scheduled start time with check-in window.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
